summary: VRF auto-issuance feature tested. All 17 backend + code-inspection tests pass. One frontend bug fixed (module-8/9 descriptions still contained 'outside the Verified Registry ID framework' text — updated in moduleData.js).

fixed_in_this_iteration.issue: Module-8 and Module-9 descriptions still contained 'outside the Verified Registry ID framework' — updated both to 'Included in enrollment as an extension module.'

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: _issue_vrf_id_if_eligible uses DONE = {'approved','complete','conditional'} — 'conditional' counts as done for modules 1-5 which seems intentional (only module-6 conditional triggers the module-7 requirement).
Frontend: Module-6 approved still shows VerifiedRegistryID directly (line 1056-1058) — this is correct clean-path behavior.
context_for_next_testing_agent: VRF auto-issuance fully implemented and tested. _issue_vrf_id_if_eligible in portal.py handles modules 1-6 + module-7 conditional. admin.py imports and calls it. mark_module_complete also calls it. Frontend isAllCoreDone() mirrors backend. Module-8/9 description text was fixed in this run.
